scripts.docker:build:prod: docker compose -p myturbo-project_prod --env-file .env.prod.local -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml build
scripts.docker:build:dev: docker compose -p myturbo-project_dev --env-file .env.dev.local -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml build
scripts.deploy: docker compose -p myturbo-project_prod --env-file .env.prod.local -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
scripts.start: docker compose -p myturbo-project_prod --env-file .env.prod.local -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml up
scripts.docker:dev: docker compose -p myturbo-project_dev --env-file .env.dockerdev.local -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up
scripts.docker:gen: docker compose -p myturbo-project_dev exec app yarn prisma generate --schema=./packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.docker:pull: docker compose -p myturbo-project_dev exec app yarn prisma db push --force-reset --schema=./packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.docker:native: docker compose -p myturbo-project_dev -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml run native
scripts.docker:native:dev: docker compose -p myturbo-project_dev -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml run native yarn expo start --tunnel
scripts.sync: docker compose -p myturbo-project_dev --env-file .env.dockerdev.local -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.sync.yml up
scripts.env:dev: docker compose -p myturbo-project_dev --env-file .env.dockerdev.local -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d postgres prisma
